topPlaces.name: Charoun, Munger
topPlaces.description: Charoun is a village of Munger district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is situated 7 km (4.3 mi) from Munger city centre.

topPlaces.name: Surajgarha
topPlaces.description: Surajgarha is one of seven blocks in Lakhisarai district of Bihar consisting of 117 villages. It lies on the banks of the Ganges River and is 17 km north-east of Lakhisarai.

items.note: Charoun is a village of Munger district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is situated 7 km (4.3 mi) from Munger city centre.
Surajgarha is one of seven blocks in Lakhisarai district of Bihar consisting of 117 villages. It lies on the banks of the Ganges River and is 17 km north-east of Lakhisarai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (126 km) and the nearest railway station is Patna Junction (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhimbandh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Charoun, Munger, Surajgarha.
